title: M.K. Stalin convenes meeting with allies as DMK second-line leaders press for coalition with AIADMK
description: CPI(M) State secretary P. Shanmugam, CPI State secretary M. Veerapandian, and VCK leader Thol. Thirumavalavan were among those who rushed to Mr. Stalin’s Cenotaph Road residence to attend the meeting on May 7, 2026
